title: vernonia schweinfurthii var. bukamaensis
intro: Vernonia schweinfurthii var. bukamaensis, a plant species in the Asteraceae family, is commonly known as Bukamaensis or Bukama. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Democratic Republic of Congo, where it is valued for its medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of Vernonia schweinfurthii var. bukamaensis have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be used to alleviate various health conditions, and its extracts may be used to create topical creams and ointments for wound healing and skin care.
